arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the Lex bot alias.

bot_version.description: The version of the Lex bot that the alias points to.

checksum.description: A checksum used to verify the integrity of the Lex bot alias.

created_date.description: The date when the Lex bot alias was created.

description.description: A brief description of the Lex bot alias.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Lex bot alias.

last_updated_date.description: The date when the Lex bot alias was last updated.
